title: 2024 FOMC Press Releases
summary: This is a listing page (index) from the Federal Reserve website containing links to 2024 FOMC press releases. The actual content of the FOMC statements and projections is not present in this source; only dates and titles are listed. This page serves as an index and cannot be used as a standalone archiveable document for research purposes.
key_points: Page is a listing/index page containing links to 2024 FOMC materials, not the actual statements or projections
Lists 8 FOMC statement dates: January 31, March 20, May 1, June 12, July 31, September 18, November 7, and December 18, 2024
Lists 3 economic projections (dot plot) releases: March 20, June 12, September 18, and December 18, 2024
January 31, 2024 includes reaffirmation of longer-run goals statement and updates to trading policy
Actual statement text, projections details, and voting records are not included in this source
Last update date shown is February 26, 2026
why_it_matters: This listing page provides a catalog of 2024 Federal Reserve communications but lacks the substantive content needed for research. To properly archive FOMC decisions, individual statement pages and projection releases must be accessed separately.

issues_found: Source is a listing_page (index) with no substantive content - Core Rule 5 prohibits archiving homepage, navigation, listing, or search pages
Only contains dates and titles of FOMC releases; actual statement text, projections data, rate decisions, and voting records are absent
event_type set to 'unknown' when source is clearly monetary_policy-related FOMC material - should be more specific
published_at set to '2024-01-01' appears fabricated; the listing page itself was last updated 2026-02-26, not published in 2024
Source is too thin/noisy to have archival value per Core Rule 6 - individual FOMC statement pages should be crawled separately
No policy details, forward guidance, or market-relevant content can be extracted from this index

notes: Non-archiveable listing page. This is an index of 2024 FOMC press releases with dates and titles only. The actual policy statements, forward guidance, rate decisions, vote tallies, and projection details are not present in this source. For research purposes, each individual FOMC statement and projections release should be crawled as separate documents. The listing indicates 8 FOMC meetings in 2024 (January, March, May, June, July, September, November, December) with associated economic projections released at 4 of those meetings.
